channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tributes Offered to Ali Khamenei at Iran Culture House in Delhi Amid Israel-Iran Tensions
item.description: Reports indicate that tributes were offered to Ali Khamenei at the Iran Culture House in Delhi, coinciding with heightened tensions between Israel and Iran. The incident, which sparked considerable in...

item.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Holds for Now Amid Ongoing Negotiations
item.description: The recent high-level 'Islamabad Talks' between the United States and Iran concluded without a formal agreement, despite 21 hours of intense negotiations. US Vice President JD Vance announced that Ira...

item.title: FG orders withdrawal of passports from Nigerians who officially renounce their citizenship
item.description: The Federal Government don announce say any Nigerian wey officially renounce him citizenship go lose him Nigerian passport. According to Minister of Interior, Olubunmi Tunji-Ojo, the Nigeria Immigrati...

item.title: Bus Crash on A9 Leaves Two Injured
item.description: A bus operated by Ember has crashed down an embankment on the A9, north of Aviemore in the Scottish Highlands, resulting in two passengers being taken to hospital. The incident occurred at approximate...

item.title: Sofia Andres shows depth and range in her portrayal of Claudia in ‘The Alibi’
item.description: In the ABS-CBN drama series “The Alibi,” Sofia Andres takes on the character of Claudia Cabrera—a complex woman whose emotional depth and intensity make her one of the most talked-about roles on Phili...

item.title: Hungarian elections mark end of Orban’s 16-year rule as Peter Magyar secures decisive victory
item.description: Hungary witnessed a historic political transition on April 12, 2026, as nationalist Prime Minister Viktor Orban conceded defeat to his conservative challenger, Peter Magyar, after sixteen years in pow...

item.title: ASX set for modest gains despite US-Iran negotiation breakdown; Aussie dollar weakens
item.description: The Australian sharemarket is poised to open higher despite the collapse of weekend US-Iran peace talks, which is expected to increase oil prices and drive investors towards safe-haven assets. ASX fut...

item.title: MNBC president removed after independent review finds breach of fiduciary duty and misconduct
item.description: The Métis Nation British Columbia (MNBC) has announced the removal of its president, Walter Mineault, after an independent investigation concluded that he had breached his fiduciary duty and engaged i...

item.title: Trinamool MLA Kabir confirms authenticity of 1,000 crore video, alleges selective editing
item.description: Kolkata: Suspended Trinamool MLA Humayun Kabir has confirmed that a video showing him allegedly seeking Rs 1,000 crore from the BJP and referring to Muslims as 'gullible' is authentic. However, Kabir ...

item.title: Omah Lay Comments on Divisions Among Fans in Nigerian Music Industry
item.description: Afrobeats singer Omah Lay don yan say the Nigerian music industry dey split into two main sides: fans wey dey support Davido and fans wey dey follow Wizkid. E talk say at one point, e sef unfollow Bur...

item.title: Countries Offering Citizenship at Birth: A Guide for Nigerians
item.description: Many Nigerians are exploring the option of giving birth abroad to secure citizenship for their children, often hoping for better opportunities or access to certain benefits. This article outlines coun...

item.title: Trump orders US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz amid stalled Iran talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump has taken a significant step by ordering a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial waterway for global oil shipments, as tensions with Iran escalate. The move comes...

item.title: Marumo Gallants and Orbit College remain in relegation zone after goalless draw
item.description: Marumo Gallants and Orbit College remain entrenched in the relegation zone of the Betway Premiership after a dull 0-0 draw at the Dr Petrus Molemela Stadium in Bloemfontein on Sunday. Both teams creat...

item.title: Colorado Avalanche Coach Bednar Sustains Facial Injuries, Will Miss Upcoming Road Games
item.description: Colorado Avalanche head coach Jared Bednar sustained facial fractures and a corneal abrasion after being struck by a puck during Saturday night’s game against the Vegas Golden Knights. Bednar, who was...

item.title: How negative expectations can ruin your relationships
item.description: This Nation Africa lifestyle piece explores the habit of constantly expecting disappointment or heartbreak in romantic relationships. It discusses how such pessimistic thinking often stems from past e...

item.title: Cathay Pacific Reduces Flights Amid Rising Jet Fuel Prices
item.description: Hong Kong-based airline Cathay Pacific is responding to surging jet fuel costs, largely driven by the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, by cutting a portion of its passenger flights. From mid-May u...

item.title: BINI's Coachella Set: A Look at the Arrangement Process
item.description: The arrangement behind Filipino girl group BINI's debut performance at Coachella has been revealed, offering a glimpse into the creative process behind their highly anticipated set. The performance, m...

item.title: Kenya U-17 Girls Win First Leg Against Namibia in World Cup Qualifiers
item.description: Kenya’s Junior Starlets secured a 2-1 victory over Namibia on Sunday in Windhoek during the first round of the 2026 FIFA Under-17 Women’s World Cup qualifiers. Goals came from Lindey Weey in the third...

item.title: Court Upholds Death Sentence in Carpenter's Lover Murder Case
item.description: Mhapa, a serious situation has unfolded in Arusha. The Court of Appeal, in a decision delivered on Friday, has upheld the death sentence for Alex Julius, a carpenter, following his conviction for the ...

item.title: Man City narrows gap on Arsenal while Spurs struggle near relegation zone
item.description: Manchester City delivered a dominant 3-0 victory over Chelsea at Stamford Bridge on Sunday, sending a strong signal to Premier League leaders Arsenal. Arsenal’s surprise 2-1 defeat at home to Bournemo...
